ab: mosa’ blaq wahan su’ myan cisal cikay?
ch: A:我可以訪問你嗎?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: mawsa’ blaq wahan su’ myan cisal cikay?
ch: A:我可以訪問你嗎?

ab: aw ay. baha yaqih lpi.
ch: B:可以，我很願意。
en: B: Yes, I would love to.

ab: aw ay. baha zyaqih lpi.
ch: B:可以，我很願意。
en: B: Yes, I would love to.

ab: mosa’ blaq wahan su’ myan cisal cikay?
ch: A+:我可以訪問你嗎?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: mawsa’ blaq wahan su’ myan cisal cikay?
ch: A:我可以訪問你嗎?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: laxi wah. ungat nanu’ baqun maku’.
ch: B:不要，我所知道的不多。
en: B:Don’t, I don’t know much about it.

ab: mosa’ su’ mhhriq babaw kinryax isu’? aki’ saku’ mwah cisal isu’, pswazyal su’?
ch: A+:你下午有空嗎?我想去拜訪你可以嗎?
en: A: Are you free this afternoon? I’d like to visit you, is that okay?

ab: mawsa’ su’ mhayhriq babaw kinryax isu’? aki’ saku’ mwah cisal isu’, pswazyal su’?
ch: A:你下午有空嗎?我想去拜訪你可以嗎?
en: A: Are you free this afternoon? I’d like to visit you, is that okay?

ab: mosa’ su’ mhhriq babaw kinryax isu’? aki’ saku’ mwah cisal isu’, mosa’ blaq?
ch: A:你下午有空嗎?我想去拜訪你可以嗎?
en: A: Are you free this afternoon? I’d like to visit you, is that okay?

ab: mawsa’ su’ mhayhriq babaw kinryax isu’? aki’ saku’ mwah cisal isu’, mawsa’ blaq?
ch: A:你下午有空嗎?我想去拜訪你可以嗎?
en: A: Are you free this afternoon? I’d like to visit you, is that okay?

ab: aw. n_gaw misu’ ngasal.
ch: B:好，我會在家等你。
en: B: Okay, I’ll wait for you at home.

ab: mosa’ su’ mhhriq suxan? aki’ misu’ wahan maqut cikay zyuwaw na ’Tayal.
ch: A+:你明天有空嗎?我想請問你關於泰雅族的傳說故事。
en: A: Are you free tomorrow? I would like to ask you about the legendary stories of the Atayal people.

ab: mawsa’ su’ mhayhriq suxan? aki’ misu’ wahan maqut cikay zyuwaw na ’Tayal.
ch: A:你明天有空嗎?我想請問你關於泰雅族的傳說故事。
en: A: Are you free tomorrow? I would like to ask you about the legendary stories of the Atayal people.

ab: mmosa’ saku’ rgyax suxan. izyat saku’ pkaki’ ngasal.
ch: B:明天我要去山上，不在家喔。
en: B: I’m going to the mountains tomorrow, so I won’t be home.

ab: mmawsa’ saku’ rgyax suxan. izyat saku’ pkaki’ ngasal.
ch: B:明天我要去山上，不在家喔。
en: B: I’m going to the mountains tomorrow, so I won’t be home.

ab: pongan maku’ ke’ ga, pzyux balay baqun su’ gaga’ ru qnxan na ’Tayal sraral ma, ru aki’ saku’ nyux mwah mcisal cikay isu’.
ch: A+:我聽說您對泰雅族的傳統習俗非常了解，想要請教您一下。
en: A: I heard that you are very knowledgeable about the traditional customs of the Atayal and I would like to ask you a few questions.

ab: pawngan maku’ kay’ ga, pzyux balay baqun su’ gaga’ ru qnxan na ’Tayal sraral ma, ru aki’ saku’ nyux mwah mcisal cikay isu’.
ch: A:我聽說您對泰雅族的傳統習俗非常了解，想要請教您一下。
en: A: I heard that you are very knowledgeable about the traditional customs of the Atayal and I would like to ask you a few questions.

ab: ini’ kpzyux iyal baqun maku’, nway ru kya qu baqun maku’ ga, syukaw misu’.
ch: B:我所了解的不多，但是我會盡量回答。
en: B: I don’t know much about it, but I will try to answer as best I can.

ab: mosa’ blaq galan maku’ qlimu’ pincisal ta’? aki’ maku’ inblayqun miru’ ru smr’zyut.
ch: A+:請問我可以錄影嗎?這樣以後比較容易記錄。
en: A: Can I record the video? It will be easier to record in the future.

ab: mawsa’ blaq galan maku’ qlimu’ pincisal ta’? aki’ maku’ inblayqun miru’ ru smr’zyut.
ch: A:請問我可以錄影嗎?這樣以後比較容易記錄。
en: A: Can I record the video? It will be easier to record in the future.

ab: aw. nway.
ch: B:好的，沒問題。
en: B: Okay, no problem.

ab: pira’ kawas su’ la?
ch: A:請問您今年幾歲了?
en: A: How old are you?

ab: mqiru’ pgan mspat kawas maku’ la.
ch: B:我已經98歲了。
en: B: I’m 98 years old.

ab: ’laqi’ su’ balay na’.
ch: A:您真年輕。
en: A: You’re so young.

ab: baqa la! nbkis saku’ la.
ch: B:沒有啦!我已經老了。
en: B: No, I’m not! I’m old.

ab: baha la! nbkis saku’ la.
ch: B:沒有啦!我已經老了。
en: B: No, I’m not! I’m old.

ab: minkahul su’ inu’?
ch: A:請問您來自哪裡?
en: A: Where are you from?

ab: minkahul saku’ R’uzyan.
ch: B:我來自白蘭。
en: B: I’m from White Orchid.

ab: ’Tayal uzi kneril su’?
ch: A+:請問您的太太也是泰雅族人嗎?
en: A: Is your wife also an Atayal?

ab: ’Tayal uzi knayril su’?
ch: A:請問您的太太也是泰雅族人嗎?
en: A: Is your wife also an Atayal?

ab: izyat. hya’ ga Saysyat.
ch: B:不，她是賽夏族人。
en: B: No, she’s a Saisiat.

ab: pira’ ini’ ptnaq na ke’ baqun su’ kmal?
ch: A+:您會說哪些語言?
en: A: What languages do you speak?

ab: pira’ ini’ ptnaq na kay’ baqun su’ kmal?
ch: A:您會說哪些語言?
en: A: What languages do you speak?

ab: baq saku’ kmal ke’ na ’Tayal ru ke’ na plmukan.
ch: B: 我會說泰雅語和客家語。
en: B: I speak Thai and Hakka.

ab: baq saku’ kmal kay’ na ’Tayal ru kay’ na plmukan.
ch: B: 我會說泰雅語和客家語。
en: B: I speak Thai and Hakka.

ab: mzimu’ balay inlungan maku’ pincisal ta’ soni’. pinqzyuwani cikay qu psaniq na musa’ rgyax ku?
ch: A+:今天很高興能訪問您，請您談一下，有關狩獵的禁忌好嗎?
en: A: It’s a pleasure to interview you today, can you talk about the taboo of hunting?

ab: mzimu’ balay inlungan maku’ pincisal ta’ sawni’. pinqzyuwani cikay qu psaniq na musa’ rgyax ku?
ch: A:今天很高興能訪問您，請您談一下，有關狩獵的禁忌好嗎?
en: A: It’s a pleasure to interview you today, can you talk about the taboo of hunting?

ab: aw. sraral squ mrkyas saku’ na’ ga, mutux saku’ lokah musa’ rgyax.
ch: B:好的。我年輕的時候很常上山打獵。
en: B: Yes. I used to go hunting in the mountains when I was young.

ab: aw. sraral squ mrkyas saku’ na’ ga, mutux saku’ lawkah musa’ rgyax.
ch: B:好的。我年輕的時候很常上山打獵。
en: B: Yes. I used to go hunting in the mountains when I was young.

ab: mhway su’! blaq balay pincbaq su’ soni’.
ch: A+:謝謝，您今天所教導的真是太棒了。
en: A: Thank you, what you taught me today was really great.

ab: mhway su’! blaq balay pincbaq su’ sawni’.
ch: A:謝謝，您今天所教導的真是太棒了。
en: A: Thank you, what you taught me today was really great.

ab: balay balay kwara’ wal maku’ spinqzyu’ soni’. ’nubuy maku’ squ pinqzyuwan na kinbkisan.
ch: B:我所説的都是千真萬確的，祖先所流傳的講述。
en: B: All that I say is true, the sayings of my ancestors.

ab: balay balay kwara’ wal maku’ spinqzyu’ sawni’. ’nubuy maku’ squ pinqzyuwan na kinbkisan.
ch: B:我所説的都是千真萬確的，祖先所流傳的講述。
en: B: All that I say is true, the sayings of my ancestors.

ab: nway mucing sqani qu pincisal ta’ soni’. mhway su’ balay la.
ch: A+:今天的訪談就到這邊。非常謝謝您的分享。
en: A: That’s all for today’s interview. Thank you very much for sharing with us.

ab: nway mucing sqani qu pincisal ta’ sawni’. mhway su’ balay la.
ch: A:今天的訪談就到這邊。非常謝謝您的分享。
en: A: That’s all for today’s interview. Thank you very much for sharing with us.

ab: baqa la. ’wah cisal lozi babaw nya’.
ch: B:不客氣，我們再聊。
en: B: You’re welcome, let’s talk again.

ab: baha la. ’wah cisal lawzi babaw nya’.
ch: B:不客氣，我們再聊。
en: B: You’re welcome, let’s talk again.

ab: mmosa’ saku’ lki. wahay misu’ mqaut lozi babaw nya’, aki’ pzyux qu baqun maku’.
ch: A+:我要離開了，期待下次聽到更多的故事。
en: A: I’m going to leave now and look forward to hearing more stories next time.

ab: mmawsa’ saku’ lki. wahay misu’ mqaut lawzi babaw nya’, aki’ pzyux qu baqun maku’.
ch: A:我要離開了，期待下次聽到更多的故事。
en: A: I’m going to leave now and look forward to hearing more stories next time.

ab: aw! thhway musa’.
ch: B:好喔!請慢走。
en: B: Okay! Please take care.

ab: aw! thayhway musa’.
ch: B:好喔!請慢走。
en: B: Okay! Please take care.
